heroHeadline: El Guano Evades Largest Golden Triangle Operation in Years; SEDENA Confirms El Chapo's Brother Still at Large
heroSubtitle: 637 days since El Mayo's capture — April 22: Major federal operation (5 Black Hawk helicopters, National Guard, Marines) targets El Guano in Badiraguato/Golden Triangle; García Harfuch confirms detainees but not El Guano. April 23: SEDENA officially denies El Guano's capture — El Chapo's brother evades for fourth time. Background: March 2026 saw lowest Sinaloa homicide count since Sep 2024 (121 deaths); CIA officers killed Apr 21 in Chihuahua drug lab crash; El Mayo EDNY sentencing postponed to May 18.
footerNote: Data sourced from Noroeste, Riodoce, Proceso, InSight Crime, Reuters, AP, Animal Político, ACLED, DEA, SEDENA, SEMAR, Al Jazeera, AFP, Infobae, La Jornada, CBC News, Excelsior, El Diario del Noroeste, White House ONDCP, DOJ, El Informador, El Imparcial, Latin Times, Zeta Tijuana, NBC Los Angeles, KTLA, Washington Times, NBC Chicago, UPI, US State Department, CNN, Washington Post, CBS News, Expansión Política, La Razón, El Financiero, Latinus, Ejecentral, La Razón, El Diario de Chihuahua, Ground News
